info.title: Sentinel Gateway
info.description: Public-facing API edge for the Sentinel platform. Handles authentication, rate limiting, metering, and routing across all access surfaces (REST, MCP, Chat, A2A).

get.description: Return 200 immediately. Used by Kubernetes liveness probes.

Check that critical dependencies are reachable.

Probes Redis connectivity. Additional upstream checks can be added
here as the service matures. Returns 503 when any check fails.

post.summary: Register a new account and start a session
post.description: Create an account via core-api, set the session cookie, return the user.

schema.title: Response Register V1 Auth Register Post

post.description: Verify credentials via core-api, set the session cookie, return the user.

schema.title: Response Login V1 Auth Login Post

get.description: Return the session user's profile, or 401 if there is no valid session.

schema.title: Response Me V1 Auth Me Get
Response Logout V1 Auth Logout Post

get.description: Return a paginated, filtered page of live agents for the marketplace.

schema.title: Response List Listings V1 Listings Get

get.summary: Get a marketplace agent by slug
get.description: Return a single live agent by its URL slug.

schema.title: Response Get Listing By Slug V1 Listings Slug  Slug  Get

get.summary: Get a marketplace agent by ID
get.description: Return a single live agent by its UUID.

schema.title: Response Get Listing V1 Listings  Agent Id  Get

get.description: Return the authenticated buyer's wallet balance.

schema.title: Response Get Balance V1 Billing Balance Get

get.description: Return a page of the buyer's ledger, reshaped for the console.

schema.title: Response Get Ledger V1 Billing Ledger Get

get.description: Return the buyer's recorded top-up payments as invoices.

schema.title: Response Get Invoices V1 Billing Invoices Get

post.summary: Add credits to the caller's wallet
post.description: Record a placeholder top-up and return the resulting balance.

schema.title: Response Topup V1 Billing Topup Post

get.description: List the session user's keys (secrets never included).

schema.title: Response List Keys V1 Keys Get

post.description: Create a key for the session user; returns the secret once.

schema.title: Response Create Key V1 Keys Post

delete.description: Revoke one of the session user's keys.

schema.title: Response Revoke Key V1 Keys  Key Id  Delete

get.description: Return the public metadata card for ``{developer}/{slug}``.

schema.title: Response Agent Metadata V1 Agents  Developer   Slug  Get

post.description: Charge the caller (in points) for one successful call and return the result.

schema.title: Response Use Agent V1 Agents  Developer   Slug  Use Post

get.summary: x402 discovery catalog of all live agents
get.description: Return every live agent in the x402 discovery format.

schema.title: Response X402 Agents V1 X402 Agents Get

post.description:
Invoke a Sentinel agent and return its output.

Proxies the request to core-api which resolves the tier and target,
then delegates to either sentinel-runtime (Tier A) or the developer
endpoint (Tier B). Auth metadata is forwarded as internal headers.

Args:
    agent_id: The agent's unique identifier.
    body: Invocation payload and options.
    request: Raw FastAPI request (used to access app state).
    principal: Resolved authenticated caller (injected).
    settings: Application settings (injected).

Stream a chat response from an agent.

Forwards the request to core-api with streaming enabled. The
response is proxied back as a chunked text/event-stream.

Args:
    agent_id: The agent's unique identifier.
    request: Raw FastAPI request.
    principal: Resolved authenticated caller (injected).
    settings: Application settings (injected).

post.summary: MCP Streamable HTTP endpoint for an agent
post.description:
Handle an MCP JSON-RPC 2.0 request for a specific agent.

Fetches the agent's tool manifest from the registry, validates the
incoming JSON-RPC method, and proxies execution to core-api. The
response format follows the MCP Streamable HTTP transport spec.

Args:
    agent_id: The agent whose tools are being invoked.
    request: Raw FastAPI request containing the JSON-RPC body.
    principal: Authenticated caller (injected).
    settings: Application settings (injected).

Send a chat turn to an agent and stream the response back.

The response is a Server-Sent Events stream (``text/event-stream``)
where each ``data:`` line is a JSON-encoded partial response chunk
from the agent. The final chunk includes the ``usage`` metadata.

Args:
    body: The chat request including conversation history.
    request: Raw FastAPI request.
    principal: Authenticated caller (injected).
    settings: Application settings (injected).

get.description:
Serve the A2A agent card for peer agent discovery.

The agent card follows the A2A discovery specification and includes
the agent's capabilities, MCP endpoint URL, and authentication
requirements. No authentication is required for card discovery.

Args:
    agent_id: The agent whose card is requested.
    settings: Application settings (injected).
    request: Raw FastAPI request.

post.description:
Submit an agent-to-agent task with a signed spend mandate.

The mandate is validated before forwarding to core-api. Tasks that
exceed the mandate budget or whose mandate has expired are rejected
with 402 / 403 respectively.

Args:
    agent_id: Target agent identifier.
    body: Task request body including the signed spend mandate.
    request: Raw FastAPI request.
    principal: Authenticated calling agent (injected).
    settings: Application settings (injected).
    idempotency_key: Optional header-level idempotency key.

mandate.description: Signed spend budget authorised by the calling agent.

idempotency_key.title: Idempotency Key
idempotency_key.description: Client idempotency key for safe retries.

A2ATaskRequest.title: A2ATaskRequest
A2ATaskRequest.description: Request body for submitting an A2A task.

task_id.title: Task Id
task_id.description: Unique task identifier for status polling.

A2ATaskResponse.title: A2ATaskResponse
A2ATaskResponse.description: Response from a submitted A2A task.

ChatMessage.title: ChatMessage
ChatMessage.description: A single message in a chat turn.

messages.title: Messages
messages.description: Conversation history including the new user turn.

max_cost_credits.title: Max Cost Credits
max_cost_credits.description: Hard credit ceiling for this turn.

ChatRequest.title: ChatRequest
ChatRequest.description: Request body for the chat endpoint.

status.title: Status
status.description: Always 'ok' when the process is alive.

HealthResponse.title: HealthResponse
HealthResponse.description: Response body for the liveness probe.

max_cost_credits.title: Max Cost Credits
max_cost_credits.description: Hard ceiling on credits this invocation may consume. Defaults to the global cap.

idempotency_key.title: Idempotency Key
idempotency_key.description: Client-supplied idempotency key for safe retries.

ready.title: Ready
ready.description: True when all dependencies are healthy.

checks.title: Checks
checks.description: Per-dependency check result: 'ok' or an error message.

ReadinessResponse.title: ReadinessResponse
ReadinessResponse.description:
Response body for the readiness probe.

Reports the health of each critical dependency. The HTTP status code
is 200 when all dependencies are reachable, 503 otherwise.

RegisterBody.title: RegisterBody
RegisterBody.description: Console registration payload (camelCase from the browser).

budget_credits.title: Budget Credits
budget_credits.description: Maximum credits this task may consume.

expires_at.title: Expires At
expires_at.description: UNIX timestamp after which the mandate is invalid.

issuer.title: Issuer
issuer.description: Agent identity that issued the mandate.

signature.title: Signature
signature.description: Ed25519 signature over the mandate payload.

SpendMandate.title: SpendMandate
SpendMandate.description: AP2-style signed spend mandate attached to an agent-to-agent task.

duration_ms.title: Duration Ms
duration_ms.description: Wall-clock time for the invocation in milliseconds.

credits_charged.title: Credits Charged
credits_charged.description: Credits deducted from the caller's balance.

UsageMetadata.title: UsageMetadata
UsageMetadata.description: Token and credit usage returned alongside the invocation output.
